content:
- Executed task 05 plan end-to-end.
- Implemented v2 config UX hardening:
  - schema: added RoleAuthConfigV2Input + made process.binaries optional in v2 input to avoid serde missing-field parse errors.
  - parser/defaults: normalized to ConfigError::Validation with stable field paths; added many v2 migration tests for roles/auth/TLS/client_auth invariants.
- Fixed example invariant mismatch: examples/debug_ui_smoke_server.rs rewind_conn_identity.user now matches roles.rewinder.username.
- Added CLI integration tests (tests/cli_binary.rs) asserting node binary prints actionable config errors (missing config_version and missing process.binaries).
- Added operator docs page docs/src/operations/config-migration-v2.md + linked from SUMMARY and reading-guide.
- Resolved rustls 0.23 CryptoProvider panic:
  - switched WebPkiClientVerifier usage to builder_with_provider in src/tls.rs and src/test_harness/tls.rs.
  - switched harness client/server config builders to *_with_provider.
- Verification gates all green:
  - make check, make test, make test-long, make lint.
- Ran /bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh; committed + pushed (2 commits: main task-finished commit + checklist tick followup).

- Choose-Task: read .ralph/current_tasks.md and applied bug-first + meta-task rules.
- No bug tasks were failing (<passes>false</passes>); several normal tasks still had <passes>false</passes>.
- Selected next task: .ralph/tasks/story-secure-explicit-node-config/06-task-full-verification-for-secure-explicit-config-refactor.md (final verification after secure explicit config refactor).
- Wrote selected task path to .ralph/current_task.txt.

- Read /home/joshazimullah.linux/work_mounts/patroni_rewrite/pgtuskmaster_rust/Makefile and `tools/docs-architecture-no-code-guard.sh` to trace targets.
- `check` uses `CARGO_INCREMENTAL` (default 0) and runs `cargo check --all-targets`.
- `test` aborts when `RUST_TEST_THREADS=1`, wraps `cargo test --all-targets` in timeout (120s kill-after 15s), and skips explicit ULTRA_LONG test names.
- `test-long` loops over ULTRA_LONG test targets and runs each individually with `cargo test --all-targets`.
- `lint` runs docs-lint plus three clippy passes with strict denial flags.
- No Makefile-level log files are written; all outputs go to terminal unless caller redirects.

- Performed a scan of .ralph task corpus for existing full verification-style tasks.
- Read AGENTS progress log via .ralph/progress_read.sh and identified active task: story-secure-explicit-node-config 06.
- Opened and compared story-full-verification tasks 01-04 and secure-node full-verification task 06.
- Extracted bug-task workflow: add-bug skill format and representative bug files in .ralph/tasks/bugs.
- Next: summarize observed structure (metadata, acceptance criteria, evidence log patterns, bug-creation triggers, and closeout conventions).

- Reviewed .ralph task workflow docs and skill files to answer how bug tasks are created and documented.
- Confirmed canonical bug template comes from .agents/skills/add-bug/SKILL.md; task execution lifecycle requirements are in .ralph/ralph-do-task.md.
- Verified real examples in .ralph/tasks/bugs/*.md show common sections like <description>, <acceptance_criteria>, optional <execution_plan>, and explicit "Execution Evidence" command/result bullets.
- Next time, if asked, provide a tiny ready-to-copy bug-task skeleton aligned to current conventions including status/passes/passing tags and evidence block style.

- Read previous progress and current task: `.ralph/tasks/story-secure-explicit-node-config/06-task-full-verification-for-secure-explicit-config-refactor.md`.
- Used parallel subagents to inspect Makefile gates, ralph/add-bug workflow, and prior full-verification task patterns.
- Added a detailed execution plan + failure triage map + evidence logging plan to `.ralph/tasks/story-secure-explicit-node-config/06-task-full-verification-for-secure-explicit-config-refactor.md` and marked it `TO BE VERIFIED`.
- Next: per workflow, do a deep skeptical review of the plan (must change at least one thing), then replace `TO BE VERIFIED` with `NOW EXECUTE` and run `make check`, `make test`, `make test-long`, `make lint` with evidence logs under `.ralph/evidence/story-secure-explicit-node-config/06-task-full-verification-for-secure-explicit-config-refactor/`.

- Inspected installer scripts referenced by plan: tools/install-postgres16.sh, tools/install-etcd.sh, tools/install-mdbook.sh, tools/install-mdbook-mermaid.sh.
- Confirmed all four files exist at those exact names under tools/.
- Captured behavior details:
  - install-postgres16.sh: Linux + Alma/RHEL gated, requires sudo+dnf, installs system packages via dnf module stream 16, then symlinks binaries into .tools/postgres16/bin.
  - install-etcd.sh: accepts optional version arg (default v3.6.8), downloads release tarball from GitHub via curl, extracts and installs etcd binary into .tools/etcd/bin.
  - install-mdbook.sh: pinned v0.4.40, downloads mdBook tarball from GitHub via curl, verifies SHA256, extracts and installs into .tools/mdbook/bin.
  - install-mdbook-mermaid.sh: pinned 0.14.0, installs via cargo install --locked --root .tools/mdbook, so it downloads crates from registry/git as needed.
- Need to report concise per-script usage and sudo/download requirements to user.

- Inspected .ralph/task_switch.sh, .ralph/ralph-do-task.md, .ralph/ralph-choose-task.md, and task creation skills to map task lifecycle contracts.
- Confirmed task_switch.sh only sends finish email signal, appends current task path to task_history.txt, and removes current_task.txt; it does not edit task markdown tags.
- Confirmed conventions: header uses <status> + <passes>; completion workflow expects <passing>true</passing> before switch; meta-tasks require <passes>meta-task</passes> and must never be converted.
- Verified evidence conventions from active/completed tasks: logs and artifacts go under .ralph/evidence/<task-specific-dir>/, referenced from task body or <execution_report>/Execution Evidence sections; command exit status is source of truth, marker greps are supplemental evidence.
- Next: provide user with concise checklist + exact field matrix and evidence capture pointers.

- Verified Makefile target behavior for check/test/test-long/lint directly from current file.
- Confirmed hard constraints: make test rejects RUST_TEST_THREADS=1; requires timeout/gtimeout; wraps cargo test with default TEST_TIMEOUT_SECS=120 and TEST_TIMEOUT_KILL_AFTER_SECS=15; CARGO_INCREMENTAL defaults to 0 and is threaded into all four gates.
- Confirmed CARGO_BUILD_JOBS is not enforced in Makefile; it is a task-06 plan-level stability recommendation in .ralph task doc (set to 1 when running gates).
- Checked task 06 (secure-explicit-config) and mapped implications: run serially with CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0, avoid RUST_TEST_THREADS=1, and account for no timeout wrapper on make test-long/lint.

- Inspected Makefile lint pipeline and docs guard wiring with line references.
- Confirmed `lint` depends on `docs-lint`, and `docs-lint` runs `./tools/docs-architecture-no-code-guard.sh` before any clippy invocation.
- Confirmed exact clippy sequence in lint: one warnings-only all-target pass, then strict no-unwrap/expect/panic/todo/unimplemented passes for lib, tests, and all-targets.
- Read guard script details: scans only docs/src/{architecture,concepts,interfaces,testing} markdown files; fenced block languages allowlist is mermaid|bash|console|toml|text; fails on unlabeled fences, disallowed languages, and unclosed fences; also fails if no files found.
- Checked for equivalent guard targets/scripts in Makefiles and repo references; no alternative make-wired equivalent found.
- Next: report common lint/doc-guard failure modes and recommend concrete evidence capture commands/log artifacts for debugging and CI triage.
